---
name: Translation defect
about: Report a Portuguese translation that is inaccurate, drifted from English, or overstates a claim
title: "[docs][pt] "
labels: type:docs
---

**Repository and file:** (e.g. `cubeshackles-compliance-engine/README.pt.md`)

**Type of defect** (check one):
- [ ] Mistranslation (meaning differs from English)
- [ ] Maturity/claim drift (Portuguese states something stronger than English)
- [ ] Untranslated glossary term or wrong glossary term used
- [ ] Structural drift (heading/section missing, out of order)
- [ ] Stale — English source changed, Portuguese not updated
- [ ] Broken link or code block mismatch

**English source excerpt:**

**Portuguese excerpt as written:**

**Suggested correction:**

**Does this affect an institutional/regulatory claim?** yes / no — if yes,
tag for founder review per `cubeshackles/docs/CLAIMS_REGISTER.md`.
